name: 25th European Conference on e-Learning (ECEL 2026)
novel_analysis: Modality-stratified random-effects meta-regression + modality x trait interaction model — NOT reported in the Research Square preprint (RS-9513298), which only pools by Big Five trait without modality moderator.
notes: Excellence Awards consideration requires submission within abstract window. Single-author submission. ECEL extension request was emailed 2026-05-09 to info@academic-conferences.org; awaiting response.
